[Date]  

[Employer's Name]  
[Company Name]  
[Company Address]  
[City, State, ZIP Code]  

Dear [Employer's Name],

I am writing to express my interest in the position of DevOps Engineer at [Company Name], as advertised. I am particularly drawn to the opportunity of working within the Engineering department, as it closely aligns with my skills and professional goals.

With expertise in automation and cloud infrastructure, I am looking forward to improving deployment processes in the Engineering department. My experience has equipped me with a comprehensive understanding of the DevOps lifecycle, and I am enthusiastic about the prospect of contributing to streamlined and efficient operations at [Company Name].

Enclosed is my resume, which further details my capabilities and experiences. I am eager to bring my skills in automation and cloud technologies to your team and assist in the advancement of deployment systems integral to your operations.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to the success of [Company Name] as a DevOps Engineer.

Warm regards,

William Harris

goldAnswers.Cover Letter: With expertise in automation and cloud infrastructure, I am looking forward to improving deployment processes in the Engineering department.
